name: python3-rarfile
title: python3-rarfile
summary: RAR archive reader module for Python
description:
RAR archive reader module for Python
Rarfile is a Python module for reading RAR archives. The interface is made
as zipfile-like as possible. It supports both RAR3 and RAR5 archives,
multi volumes archives, unicode filenames and password-protected archives.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-rarfile because RAR archive reader module for Python.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-rarfile as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-rarfile with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-rarfile --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
